items.title: Britain wins appeal that Palestine Action ban was unlawful

items.title: Norway oil industry maintenance workers launch strike
items.summary: The Norwegian Union of Energy Workers (SAFE) said 154 oil service workers would go on strike as of 10:00 am (0800 GMT) on Monday (June 15, 2026), and another 224 would join on Thursday (June 18, 2026).
